connections.def: a primary verb; to be of interest to, i.e. to concern (only third person singular present indicative used impersonally, it matters):--(take)
from 3307 (through the idea of distraction); solicitude:--care. see GREEK for
middle voice from 1909 and the same as 3199; to care for (physically or otherwise):--take care of. see GREEK for 1909 see GREEK for
from 3308; to be anxious about:--(be, have) care(-ful), take thought. see GREEK for
from 4692; "speed", i.e. (by implication) despatch, eagerness, earnestness:--business, (earnest) care(-fulness), diligence, forwardness, haste. see GREEK for
